title: kengia gracilis
intro: Kengia gracilis, also known as the Thai pepper plant, is a type of plant in the Piperaceae family that is native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kengia gracilis include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved digestion, as well as potential protection against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Kengia gracilis include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
